rationale.R1.2: A generic request to check the passage centrally includes verifying whether the inductive-learning argument is internally consistent with learned per-node embeddings.
rationale.R1.3: The request also includes checking whether reported benchmark results and design descriptions actually support the stated claims about selective accuracy and inductive deployment.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified and the artifact provides limited experimental detail.
rationale.RX.2: The check should avoid accepting broad claims such as full inductivity or attribution of gains beyond what the text supports.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must only project responsibility and not perform the requested check or revise the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Potential downstream harm arises if unsupported methodological claims are treated as validated research conclusions.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to specific claims in the provided artifact, especially the inductive-design and node-embedding statements.
